title: Design and verify multi-AZ failover for AWS workloads
description: Map each component to AZ-redundant equivalents, then prove failover by draining an AZ rather than assuming redundancy.
body: Use when a workload must survive an AZ impairment. Do not assume a single-AZ RDS or one-subnet ASG is highly available. Actions: inventory every stateful component (RDS Multi-AZ, ElastiCache, EFS) and stateless tier (ASG/ECS across >=2 AZs behind an ALB), confirm subnets span AZs, and run a game-day that cordons one AZ's targets to observe failover. Validation signals include the ALB shifting traffic to healthy AZs, RDS completing a Multi-AZ failover within its window, and SLO error budget holding during the drill. Risk boundary: executing an AZ-drain game day against production is human-gated and scheduled.
